title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Verify Settings > SW Update shows "Up to date" when app, Osprey device, EB, and CC are on latest firmware
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile Android app is installed and updated to the latest version.
2. Ensure the Osprey (Poly Bluetooth audio device) is on the latest firmware.
3. Ensure Embedded Bluetooth (EB) and Connect Client (CC) are on the latest firmware.
4. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
5. On the Home screen, tap the Menu icon or navigate to the Settings section.
6. Tap on 'SW Update' (or 'Software Update') from the Settings menu.
7. Observe the status message displayed on the SW Update screen.
expected: The SW Update screen displays "Up to date" with no update available.
